boundary_notes: W5 probe boundary: single next-session plan only, adjusted by counselor judgment and risk assessment.
between_session_tasks: W5 probe task: optionally record one trigger, automatic thought, and emotion rating before the next session.
do_not_do: W5 probe do-not-do: do not diagnose, write a multi-session roadmap, or replace counselor judgment.
focus_areas: W5 probe focus: automatic thoughts, avoidance behavior, anxiety intensity, and risk check.
planned_interventions: W5 probe intervention: use Socratic questions and a brief thought record if clinically appropriate.
risk_monitoring: W5 probe risk: re-check suicide ideation, self-harm, sleep deterioration, and available support.
session_goal: W5 probe session goal: explore the criticism-anxiety-avoidance loop within one next session.
suggested_questions: W5 probe question: what sentence appears first when you imagine feedback?
title: W5 next-session plan acceptance fixture
